title: Explosive Lucky Block
description:
TNT, Creepers, Creeper Powered swords and even Air strikes why not?

Everything you ever wish for in this lucky block!
body:
Disclaimer this lucky block is made seperatly and doesn't require you to download original lucky block!

TNT, Creepers, Creeper Powered swords and even Air strikes why not?

Everything you ever wish for in this lucky block!

 

Currently there aren't any crafting recipes and this mod isn't survival friendly so use it at own risk!

It may destroy your base with some air strikes so use it with caution!

 

Currently this mod has 30 drops but once a week will push out a update with 20-30 more drops until there so stay tuned for more!
